description_long: This object is a modern tactical shotgun with a matte black finish and a compact, robust design. It features a single, relatively short barrel with a ventilated handguard that has multiple slots for heat dissipation and accessory mounting. The shotgun is equipped with a red dot sight mounted on the top rail, enhancing aiming precision for urban or close-quarters scenarios. The stock is adjustable and has a tactical, ergonomic shape, providing stability and comfort for the user. The receiver and trigger assembly are streamlined, with a visible trigger guard and a magazine well below the action. Accents in gold and red are present on the ejection port and sight, adding visual contrast to the predominantly black body.
description: A compact, tactical black shotgun with a ventilated handguard, red dot sight, and adjustable stock, accented with gold and red details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the barrel opening, red dot sight, and the ventilated handguard's alignment.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the shotgun, the adjustable stock, and the red dot sight profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the stock's end, the sight alignment, and the overall symmetry of the shotgun.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the ejection port with gold accent, the magazine well, and the detailed handguard.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with ventilated handguard and short barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
